word.definition: To accentuate something is to make it more noticeable.

sports_fact.text: Eddie Eagan is the only athlete to win gold at both the Summer and Winter Olympics in different sports: boxing in 1920, bobsled in 1932.

market.headline: Big Food Is Running Out of Moves With Shoppers and Investors
market.summary: Investors have rightly given up on companies such as General Mills and Kraft Heinz, which are squeezed by everything from inflation to GLP-1s.

quote.text: Even if my country remains at war with yours … remember … I am not your enemy.
quote.author: A. J. Cronin

history.text: The Great Fire of Rome causes widespread devastation and rages on for six days, destroying half of the city.
